read_more_only_when: startup context is stale or ambiguous
gameplay evidence contradicts the checkpoint handoff
action_verification_policy: Do not trust click success by itself for gameplay actions.
Capture the minimum relevant before/after state for the action you are taking.
Treat missing intended state mutation as an action failure and use the recipe fallback before continuing.

last_authoritative_checkpoint.outcome: Week 2 complete from live continuity. Final authoritative state: Turn 3, Hab-Pod 404, 345 Credits, Hunger 40, Sanity 27 after Scrap Metal triggered Tetanus-Grade Laceration.

authoritative_state.next_action: Advance Persona A through Week 3 from the week-02 checkpoint. Objective: push toward 500 Credits for Education Level 1 while protecting the reduced sanity buffer after the Week 2 laceration event.

trusted_ui_workarounds: Use stable action-card selectors first for jobs and shopping; verify state changed before assuming success.
If onboarding or a reset appears unexpectedly, capture a screenshot and run a short body-text probe before clicking through.
If live continuity is missing but a checkpoint file exists, restore it before replaying from onboarding.
For travel, apply, shopping, and work-shift clicks, compare the relevant before/after state instead of trusting the click response alone.

global_rules: PRE-FLIGHT CHECKLIST: 1. Modal Check (body.modal-active). 2. Use State Proxy. 3. Check Recipes. 4. WAIT before ACT.
Modal Check: FORBIDDEN to interact if `document.body.classList.contains('modal-active')` or `.modal-overlay` is visible.
Strict Flags First: On Linux, use `agent-browser <cmd> --session-name <name> --args '--no-sandbox'`.

session_recovery.goal: Recover authoritative play when the named browser session opens on onboarding or has no save state.

actions: Click the named city button by its `data-testid` first; city travel cards are now semantic `<button>` controls rather than custom clickable divs.
Use the location-specific `city-travel-card-*` selector instead of broad text scans or full DOM dumps whenever the destination is known.
Only fall back to targeted DOM evaluation if the expected `city-travel-card-*` control is absent or the post-click state verification fails.
verify: Check the active location label or dashboard title.
Check player time after travel when the destination should cost time.

apply_job.goal: Secure a labor shift job such as Sanitation-T3.
actions: Call `agent-browser scrollintoview` on the targeted job button before any direct click.
verify: Check CURRENT SHIFT or the persisted game state for the selected job id.
Treat a successful click response without state mutation as a failed apply attempt.
fallbacks: Re-query the specific job card and button only, not the whole DOM.
If the first direct click reports success without state change, re-run `scrollintoview`, click once more, and verify `careerLevel` or CURRENT SHIFT again.

verify: Confirm credits changed by the expected amount.
Confirm hunger or sanity moved in the expected direction.

work_shift.goal: Execute a labor shift once the current job is active.
actions: Find the visible WORK SHIFT control.
verify: Credits increase by the shift yield.
Time drops by the expected shift cost.

turn_summary_probe.goal: Capture the authoritative end-of-week state with minimal context cost.
